title: hymenophyllum ciliatum
intro: Hymenophyllum ciliatum, also known as the ciliate scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum ciliatum are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
